message:
🐛 Fix 19 test failures in Coverage Suite (#10740)

- GitHubActivity.test.tsx: Add missing useToast mock (ToastProvider required)
- NamespaceOverview.test.tsx: Add missing useToast mock (ToastProvider required)
- useCachedNodes.test.ts: Add getClusterFetcher to fetcherUtils mock and wire it to return fetchAPI

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -247,7 +247,8 @@ describe('useCachedLLMd', () => {
 
       expect(result.current.isLoading).toBe(true)
       expect(result.current.isRefreshing).toBe(true)
-      expect(result.current.isDemoFallback).toBe(true)
+      // isDemoFallback is gated by !isLoading in the hook (prevents demo badge during loading)
+      expect(result.current.isDemoFallback).toBe(false)
       expect(result.current.error).toBe('test error')
       expect(result.current.isFailed).toBe(true)
       expect(result.current.consecutiveFailures).toBe(5)
